Off Calendar Oct-12-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Continued To Oct-24-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq. special appearance for plaintiff(s) INDEPENDENT MORTGAGE CO.,

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) ROBERT HAUSER for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,546.53
Prejudgment Interest - $2717.55
Attorney's Fees - (Reserved = Counsel shall submit COST BILL)
Costs - $548.76
Total judgment in the amount of $44,812.84

PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.
